message:
feat(mvcc,harness,vdbe): add HTM abort metrics, parser-based stmt classification, and RTRIM collation dedup

Flat combining now tracks HTM abort reasons (conflict/capacity/explicit/
other) with full Intel TSX status-word classification, exposed through a
new `fsqlite_htm_metrics` virtual table in fsqlite-core.

Differential v2 harness replaces keyword heuristics with AST-based
statement classification so CTE queries and RETURNING statements route
correctly through query() instead of execute().  Weighted-row
differential automata types (filter, project, join, aggregate, distinct,
arrange) are added to bloodstream for future incremental maintenance.

VDBE distinct_key_collated now handles RTRIM collation by stripping
trailing ASCII spaces before hashing, matching SQLite semantics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
